assertions.expectation: Explains the difference between Rapid and Stable channels (Stable gets versions later, more validated)
assertions.reason: Response clearly explains that Stable is 2-3 minor versions behind Rapid, updates every 2-3 months with more testing, while Rapid has newest features with weekly updates

assertions.expectation: Notes that channel changes don't trigger an immediate upgrade or downgrade
assertions.reason: Response doesn't explicitly mention that channel changes don't trigger immediate version changes - instead focuses on the downgrade issue

assertions.expectation: Warns that if 1.30 isn't yet available on Stable, the cluster may not receive patches until Stable catches up
assertions.reason: While it mentions waiting for Stable to catch up to 1.30, it doesn't specifically warn about missing patches during the interim period

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel
assertions.reason: Provides the exact gcloud command: 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --release-channel=stable --region=YOUR_REGION'

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking version availability on Stable before switching (gcloud container get-server-config)
assertions.reason: Explicitly shows the command 'gcloud container get-server-config --region=YOUR_REGION' to check current Stable version

assertions.expectation: Discusses the impact on auto-upgrade timing going forward
assertions.reason: Mentions that Stable updates every 2-3 months vs Rapid's weekly updates, and discusses updating CI/CD pipelines for new update cadence

assertions.expectation: Mentions that the Extended channel is an option if they need even slower cadence (with cost implications)
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the Extended channel option or its cost implications

assertions.expectation: Advises coordinating the change during a maintenance window
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions planning a maintenance window in the checklist and recommends switching during the next maintenance window
